human_actions_pending.context: The user invoked $gsd-pause-work immediately after the question was presented. Do not write 04-CONTEXT.md until the answer is captured.

decisions.decision: Phase 3 uses Axinom standard License Service Message mode, not local proxy mode.
decisions.rationale: Matches official Axinom docs and avoids pretending the local license endpoint has key custody.

decisions.decision: Local Axinom validation does not call live APIs unless --live is explicitly supplied.
decisions.rationale: Prevents accidental external calls and avoids requiring tenant secrets for local tests.

decisions.decision: Axinom operational IDs/statuses are stored in explicit Video fields with legacy description fallback only.
decisions.rationale: Avoids overloading user-facing description text while preserving inherited records.

uncommitted_files.note: Git was initialized during this rescue workflow; do not stage with git add .

next_action: Resume with $gsd-resume-work, then ask the user to answer Phase 4 Grey Area 1/4 if they have not already replied. If they reply '1', accept all recommended Zoom area 1 decisions and continue smart discuss area 2/4.
context_notes: Phase 3 is fully closed. Phase 4 has not written context or plans yet. Official Zoom docs were browsed because SDK behavior is current/vendor-sensitive.
